title: Mini Lift Collapse Claims Two Lives at Construction Site
summary: A 44-year-old mason and a 55-year-old woman worker died when a mini lift collapsed at a construction site in Erode. Investigation underway.

title: Two Class 12 Students Killed in Truck Collision Near Anthiyur
summary: Two Class 12 students died and one remains critical after a truck hit their two-wheeler near Anthiyur in a tragic road accident.

title: Annavaasal Community Kitchen Completes 1000 Days of Service
summary: Community kitchen reaches historic 1,000-day milestone of feeding the hungry, having served over 2.5 lakh meals to underprivileged.

title: Farmers Protest Over Low Dairy Procurement Prices
summary: Dairy farmers organized a protest by pouring milk on roads demanding higher procurement prices from government-run cooperative agencies.

title: Erode District Crosses 90% Voter Turnout Milestone
summary: Erode district achieved over 90% polling percentage, demonstrating strong democratic participation across all constituencies.

title: MNM Supports DMK-Congress Alliance in Erode East Bypoll
summary: Kamal Haasan's Makkal Needhi Maiam extends support to DMK-Congress coalition candidate for Erode East assembly bypoll.

title: Remote Chennampatti Forest Villages Record 80% Plus Turnout
summary: Hill villages in Chennampatti forest region showed exceptional civic participation with turnout exceeding 80% despite remote location.

title: AIADMK Candidate Holds Prayer Session Before Campaigning
summary: AIADMK candidate Prabhu conducted prayers at Kondathukali Amman temple before launching intensive roadshows across Erode.

title: Heatwave Persists; Moderate to Heavy Rain Expected from April 30
summary: Erode faces extreme temperatures currently with IMD forecasting moderate to heavy rainfall starting April 30 to provide relief.

title: Anandhaas Sweet Chain Opens First Erode Outlet with 200+ Varieties
summary: Famous Coimbatore confectionery brand Anandhaas inaugurated its first store in Erode featuring 200+ sweet varieties.
